feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1909 201 1708 81
PT 1627 144 1483 9

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Afinador de Violoncelo Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Diapasão：3,99 € → 1,99 € [0,99 € ~ 3,99 €]
  • Configurações：3,99 € → 1,99 € [0,99 € ~ 3,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：9,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Diapasão：1,99 €
  • Configurações：1,99 €

Application Description

Afine o seu violoncelo instantaneamente com facilidade e precisão! · Incrivelmente preciso: Apresenta a frequência exata em Hertz. · Calibração de A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Carrega instantaneamente - O único afinador otimizado para 64 bits. · Maior capacidade de resposta e sensibilidade. · Indicador visual - a corda afinada acende. · Interface de usuário intuitiva com LED indicador de afinação. · Aplicação universal. --- Comentários? Dúvidas? Por favor, envie seus comentários através do nosso site ou: feedback@daikyoujulabs.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 墨墨记忆卡｜考研考公考证外语学习闪卡
entry.id: 墨墨记忆卡｜考研考公考证外语学习闪卡-pt-1775531867945
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • 月卡：3,99 €
  • 季卡：9,99 €
  • 年卡：29,99 €
  • 增加 500 个记忆币：0,99 €
  • 增加 16000 个记忆币：29,99 €
  • 增加 8000 个记忆币：14,99 €
  • 增加 800 个记忆币：1,99 €
  • 增加 1800 个记忆币：3,99 €
  • 增加 4000 个记忆币：8,99 €
  • 增加 1 个补签卡：0,99 €

Application Description

墨墨记忆卡 可以帮助你科学高效地规划需要记忆的知识，对抗遗忘。 - 可以把知识编辑成卡片，目前支持文字、图片、声音。 - 可以把自己的知识卡片分享给朋友，也可以搜索他人的卡片进行学习。 - 可以把知识卡片加入记忆规划，墨墨记忆卡 会为你安排合适的时间进行复习。 - 可以查看自己的记忆数据：遗忘曲线、记忆持久度、每日学习情况。 - 可以每日签到，见证自己的坚持和成长。 墨墨科技多年以来一直专注于记忆领域的探索，基于对 1300+ 亿条用户记忆行为数据的研究和统计，绘制了 3000+ 万条不同用户的遗忘曲线，协助用户高效规划自己的记忆。

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Thumper: Pocket Edition
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 3,99 € [0,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Thumper é violência musical: ação clássica, velocidade alucinante e fisicalidade brutal. Você é um besouro espacial que deve desbravar o vazio e enfrentar uma cabeça gigante desvairada. Com esta edição especial de bolso, jogue todas as nove fases épicas com apenas uma mão. Avance, domine novos movimentos e sobreviva a terríveis batalhas de chefões, tudo movido a uma pulsante trilha sonora original, que fará você sentir cada impacto esmagador. Para atingir o paraíso da sinestesia, você terá que conquistar o inferno do ritmo. ■ Características ■ ・ Controles perfeitos de um toque ・ 60 FPS tanto no modo retrato quanto no paisagem ・ Nove fases incríveis ・ Batalhas alucinantes contra chefões ・ Visuais psicodélicos e uma trilha sonora original ・ Modo PLAY + (mais rápido e mais difícil) ・ Exibição em tela inteira no iPhone X ■ Aviso ■ Fones sem fio podem causar uma latência perceptível no áudio. Para a melhor experiência, recomendamos enfaticamente o uso de alto-falantes integrados ou fones com fio.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: RadarScope
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Pro Tier 2：99,99 € → 14,99 € [14,99 € ~ 99,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：9,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Pro Tier 1：9,99 €
  • Pro Tier 2：14,99 €
  • RadarScope Pro Subscription：9,99 €

Application Description

RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities. Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy. Your initial app purchase includes the following: • Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany • 6-frame radar loops • Two built-in providers for radar data • Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US • Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia • NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes • Inspector and distance tools • Color palette options for radar data • AllisonHouse data plan integration • Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting • mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL • Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use • Support for widgets and complications • Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV • Family Sharing support RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather: • 30-frame radar loops • Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes • Severe weather watches in the US and Canada • Special weather statements in the US and Canada • Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions • SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks • WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US • Local storm reports in the US • Custom color palette support • Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices) • Family Sharing support RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including: • Everything in Pro Tier One • 50-frame radar loops • A third provider for US radar data • NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive • Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive • Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive • GOES East and GOES West satellite products • NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products • NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products • Surface observations • Atmospheric soundings in the US • Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive • More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps • Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA • Server-sent events for radar and warning updates • Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices • Family sharing support If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period. DTN is committed to safeguarding your privacy online. Our privacy policy is available for review at https://www.dtn.com/privacy-policy/ Please visit our web site for more information.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Waterlogue: Photo to Painting
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：29,99 € → 22,99 € [22,99 € ~ 34,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Monthly)：3,99 €
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Yearly)：9,99 €
  • Waterlogue Unlimited (Lifetime)：22,99 €

Application Description

You don’t need to paint to create beautiful watercolor images—Waterlogue captures the essence of your photos in brilliant, liquid color. See the world like an artist. FEATURES: • Create art that looks hand-painted • Photos become luminous watercolors in seconds • Expressive styles for portraits, landscapes, and more • Beautiful results for people and pets • Print-quality export for frameable art • Simulated watercolor, not AI • Private by design—your photos never leave your device • Customize borders, lightness, and detail ACCLAIM: • Over one million sold since 2013 • Awarded "App Store Best of 2014" by Apple • Featured as App Store App of the Day • Oprah's holiday pick! "Made with Love: DIY Gifts"—O, The Oprah Magazine • “…with Waterlogue, it’s clear that there’s a very thoughtful human touch behind the app’s painterly algorithms.” —WIRED • “…Waterlogue is going to utterly amaze you, as it’s the first app I’ve seen that gives results that really look like a watercolor painting.” —Cult of Mac • “Watercolor apps may not be a new idea, but Waterlogue does it in a gorgeous, intuitive way, and it’s quite a pleasure to use.” —AppAdvice.com • “It goes beyond typical Photoshop watercolor filters because it has more visual intelligence, and more of the feel of the real paint.” —James Gurney, Artist and Author of Dinotopia • From Tinrocket, creator of This by Tinrocket (App Store Best of 2016), Olli (App Store Best of 2017), and more KEEP UP WITH TINROCKET: • Follow @Tinrocket on Instagram for the latest! • We’re here to help: If you have a question or need assistance, you can always email us at support@tinrocket.com • If you like Waterlogue, please consider leaving an App Store review or rating. Every review counts and helps indie developers like ourselves. Waterlogue® and See the world like an artist® are registered trademarks of Tinrocket, LLC

entry.title: Tokyo Dispatcher! 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → 0,99 € [0,29 € ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Application Description

Conduzir comboios e transportar passageiros em linhas férreas japonesas. ・Simple jogo do cérebro O "Train Dispatcher!2" é um jogo do cérebro com regras simples. Não é necessária perícia. Treinar fãs, fãs de jogos, todos podem apreciá-lo. ・To todos os que se tornarão um despachante de comboios De manhã, no Japão, os clientes aguardam a chegada do comboio para irem trabalhar. Vamos iniciar o comboio e transportar os clientes. ・Goal do jogo As empresas ferroviárias japonesas são organizações com fins lucrativos. Apontemos para um elevado lucro operacional! ・How para ter lucro Receitas tarifárias - Custo de partida = lucro operacional. As receitas tarifárias são geradas quando os passageiros embarcam numa estação. Exemplo) Se dois passageiros embarcarem num comboio numa estação com uma tarifa de 20, a companhia recebe 40. Os custos de partida são cobrados de acordo com o número de vagões quando o comboio parte. Exemplo) 30 para um comboio de 2 carruagens, 40 para um comboio de 4 carruagens, e 70 para um comboio de 10 carruagens. Uma pessoa pode andar num vagão. As receitas das tarifas são geradas quando os clientes embarcam no comboio. Ajustar o horário de condução e o número de veículos de modo a obter o maior lucro. Custos de partida. Se correr demasiados comboios e a taxa de ocupação baixar, perderá receitas. ・How para operar O jogo é muito fácil de operar e as regras são simples. Tudo o que tem de fazer é ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem no melhor momento. À medida que o jogo avança, várias variações, tais como comboios expresso e estações de transferência, irão aparecer. ・Volume Desfrute de mais de 50 rotas. Por favor, experimente a grande variedade de estratégias de transporte das empresas ferroviárias japonesas. Sem anúncios, sem taxas. ・No anúncios, sem facturação Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo. As crianças também podem desfrutar do jogo. Partilhe os seus resultados no Redes sociais. Linhas de comboio com as quais pode brincar JR Japão Oriental JR Tokai JR Japão Ocidental JR Kyushu Tobu Tokyu Seibu Keio Keikyu Keihan Hankyu Hanshin Kintetsu Meitetsu Odakyu Nankai Seitetsu Sotetsu Keisei Tokyo Metro Osaka Metro Toei Metro Tsukuba Express ・Capacity é cerca de 130MB A carga de armazenamento também é pequena. Não há qualquer processamento pesado.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Só Tem Você Aqui
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → 0,29 € [0,29 € ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,29 €

Compras integradas

  • "Tempo"：0,49 €
  • Doação III：5,99 €
  • Doação II：1,99 €
  • Doação I：0,99 €

Application Description

Só tem você aqui — uma aventura atmosférica com elementos de terror em primeira pessoa. Assuma o papel de uma pessoa que se encontra presa dentro de seu sonho. Neste lugar misturam-se as memórias e os pesadelos. Para sair, você deve abrir uma pequena porta. Mergulhe na história do jogo, descubra muitos finais e descubra o segredo principal.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Wipr 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Yearly Recurring Tip：9,99 €
  • Monthly Recurring Tip：1,99 €
  • Mega Tip：22,99 €
  • Tip：5,99 €

Application Description

Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly. Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap. Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese. Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported. Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”. This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it. – Kaylee Terms & Conditions: https://kaylees.site/terms-and-conditions.html
